title: Taxi Vodice | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Vodice: fixed airport transfers to Zadar (€100) and Split, marina and resort pickups, Krka day trips and island-ferry drops. Book direct.
keywords: taxi vodice, vodice taxi, vodice airport transfer, vodice to split airport, vodice to zadar airport, vodice marina taxi, vodice to krka

schema.name: Taxi Vodice
schema.description: Private fixed-price taxi in Vodice: airport transfers to Split and Zadar, marina and resort pickups, Krka National Park day trips and island ferry drops.

mainEntity.name: Can you pick up crews at Vodice marina?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I meet yacht and charter crews right at the marina with space for luggage and provisions, and I can arrange an early or late slot around your charter.

mainEntity.name: Do you run late at night in Vodice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. If it is booked ahead I can collect you after an evening out and get you back to your accommodation safely at a fixed price.

mainEntity.name: Can you take me to the Prvić or Zlarin ferry?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Both leave from the Vodice waterfront and I can drop you right at the landing. Ask me for the fare when you book.

mainEntity.name: How much is Vodice to Zadar Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed €100 per car for up to 4 passengers, and Split Airport is €115, tolls and luggage included.
